name: Vidalia Onion Supper Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Shredded sharp process American cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onion in butter until tender, not brown.
2. Prepare the corn-muffin mix according to package directions.
3. Pour the mix into a greased 8x8x2 inch pan.
4. Sprinkle cooked onion over the top of the mix.
5. Mix sour cream and cheese; spoon over the top.
6. Bake in a hot oven (400 degrees) for 25 minutes, or until done.
7. Let cool; cut into 9 squares.
